===Pokémon===
This listing is of Drew's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Drew

|stage1=Roselia

|type2=Poison
|img=Drew Roserade.png
|epnum=AG033
|epname=Now That's Flower Power!
|vajp=Ikue Ohtani
|vajpnote=Roselia

|vaennote=Roselia
|desc={{p|Roserade}} is Drew's main Pokémon. It first appeared as a {{p|Roselia}} in ''[[AG033|Now That's Flower Power!]]''. As revealed in ''[[DP076|A Full Course Tag Battle!]]'', it evolved into Roserade while accompanying Drew in [[Johto]].}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Drew
|pkmn=Masquerain
|type1=Bug
|type2=Flying
|img=Drew Masquerain.png
|epnum=AG077
|epname=A Fan with a Plan
|vajp=Tomoe Hanba
|vaen=Rachael Lillis
|vaennote=<small>[[AG077]]-[[AG123]]</small>
|vaen2=Michele Knotz
|vaen2note=<small>[[AG180]]-[[AG181]]</small>
|desc={{p|Masquerain}} debuted in ''[[AG077|A Fan with a Plan]]''. {{an|May}}, while {{pkmn|training}} with her {{TP|May|Bulbasaur}}, stumbled across Drew training his Pokémon's Bubble attack. In the [[AG078|next episode]], he used it in the [[Rubello Town]] [[Pokémon Contest]]. In the first round, it used Ice Beam to freeze its own Bubbles, and then Hidden Power to launch the projectiles at [[Sonny]]'s {{p|Girafarig}} to knock it out. It then managed to outscore [[Savannah]]'s {{p|Lairon}} by hitting it with Hidden Power in the finals to win the Contest.

In ''[[AG113|Who, What, When, Where, Wynaut?]]'', Drew used Masquerain again to battle against [[May's Beautifly]], but they were interrupted by {{TRT}} who tried to capture their Pokémon. At the end of the episode, Drew used Masquerain alongside {{TP|Drew|Roselia}} to battle against Team Rocket together with {{an|May}} and {{Ash}}'s Pokémon. It combined a {{m|Silver Wind}} alongside May's Beautifly's to blow them away.

It reappeared in the [[Hoenn Grand Festival]]'s [[Appeal|Appeals]] stage in ''[[AG122|Deceit and Assist]]''. Its Bubble and Silver Wind impressed the crowd, scored a perfect 100, and allowed Drew to move on to the final stages of the Contest. In [[AG123|the next episode]], it fought {{ho|Robert}}'s {{p|Claydol}} and {{p|Milotic}} alongside {{p|Flygon}}, but it fell to Claydol's {{m|Hyper Beam}}.

In ''[[AG180|May, We Harley Drew'd Ya!]]'', Drew used it in the preliminaries of the [[Kanto Grand Festival]]. It got Drew through to the next round by spinning around and around to create a great gust of wind and air. In ''[[AG181|Thinning the Hoard]]'', it fought alongside Roselia and used Silver Wind alongside Roselia's {{m|Petal Dance}} to defeat a {{p|Medicham}} and a {{p|Loudred}}.

Masquerain's known moves are {{m|Bubble}}, {{m|Quick Attack}}, {{m|Hidden Power}}, {{m|Ice Beam}}, and {{m|Silver Wind}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Drew
|pkmn=Flygon
|type1=Ground
|type2=Dragon
|img=Drew Flygon.png
|epnum=AG123
|epname=Rhapsody in Drew
|vajp=Shin-ichiro Miki
|vaen=Shin-ichiro Miki
|desc={{p|Flygon}} debuted in the [[Hoenn Grand Festival]], it was sent out alongside {{TP|Drew|Roselia}} to battle [[May's Combusken]] and {{TP|May|Skitty}}, where it was able to defeat them. {{an|May}} was surprised to see it, and Drew revealed that he {{pkmn2|caught}} it specifically for the Grand Festival.

In ''[[AG139|On Cloud Arcanine]]'', it was used to try to capture an {{p|Arcanine}} and battled [[May's Squirtle]], where it won easily.

In ''[[AG175|Going for Choke!]]'', Drew used it to save {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} from {{TRT}}'s traps.

Beginning in ''[[AG181|Thinning the Hoard]]'', Drew used it in the [[Kanto Grand Festival]], along with Absol, where it battled May's Combusken and Squirtle. Flygon ended up losing to Squirtle after a tough battle, despite using a combination of its and Drew's Absol's [[move]]s, dubbed ''Dragon Razor Wind'' by [[Lilian Meridian|Lilian]].

Flygon's known moves are {{m|Dragon Breath}}, {{m|Flamethrower}}, {{m|Sandstorm}}, and {{m|Steel Wing}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Drew
|pkmn=Absol
|type1=Dark
|img=Drew Absol.png
|epnum=AG180
|epname=May, We Harley Drew'd Ya!
|vajp=Megumi Hayashibara
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|desc={{p|Absol}} debuted in the [[Kanto Grand Festival]], where Drew used it in his [[Appeal|Appeals]] Round. Even though Absol made it through to the next round with its [[move]] combinations, Drew felt it was not as dedicated to him, unlike his other Pokémon, since it was afraid to attack him with {{m|Razor Wind}} as part of their performance. After a talk with {{Ash}} later that night, Drew decided to use Absol in the Contest alongside his {{p|Flygon}} in the [[Double Battle]] round.

Later, they were to fight {{an|May}} and her {{TP|May|Combusken}} and {{TP|May|Squirtle}}. During the battle, Absol was able to use a combination of Drew's Flygon's and its moves, dubbed ''Dragon Razor Wind'' by [[Lilian Meridian|Lilian]]. After a harsh battle, Absol and Combusken were left to fight alone. However, Combusken, after making full use of its newly-learned {{m|Overheat}}, had more points than Absol when the time ran out and May moved on to the semifinals.

Absol's known moves are {{m|Flash}}, {{m|Iron Tail}}, {{m|Razor Wind}}, and {{m|Water Pulse}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Drew
|pkmn=Butterfree
|type1=Bug
|type2=Flying
|img=Drew Butterfree.png
|epnum=AG187
|epname=The Unbeatable Lightness of Seeing
|vajp=Tomoe Hanba
|vaen=Tomoe Hanba
|desc=Even though it was only recently {{pkmn2|caught}}, {{p|Butterfree}} was shown to be already very powerful. It was used in a [[Double Battle]] alongside {{TP|Drew|Roselia}} against [[May's Combusken]] and {{TP|May|Beautifly}} where it managed to defeat them after using a combo of Psybeam and {{m|Solar Beam}} from Roselia.

Butterfree's known moves are {{m|Confusion}}, {{m|Gust}}, {{m|Psybeam}}, and {{m|Protect}}.}}
